function_reachability: Is it impossible for function 'printf' to reach function 'putchar'?

dominators: Is it guaranteed that whenever line 5:  <statement> int	bar, c, i, l, p, w, mask, bitl, shift, pn, ln; </statement> is reached, the statement line 6:  <statement> for (w = 1; w <= 2; w++) { </statement> has already been reached?

data_dependency: Does the value of variable bar at line 12: <statement> 			bar = (l << shift) | p; </statement> depend on the value of variable shift at line 8: <statement> 		shift = 4 * w; </statement>?
Does the value of variable c at line 16: <statement> 					c = 'P'; </statement> depend on the value of variable i at line 14: <statement> 			for (i = bitl; i >= 0; i--) { </statement>?
liveness: Is variable 'mask' live at the end of function 'main'?
